original: The one-handed spear you stole from the hermaphrodite naleen. It has a smooth stone tip that looks very sharp. There’s a bunch of colorful feathers are tied under the tip, you’re not sure if they serve a purpose or if they are just for decoration.\n\nDue to being made from light wood and having a shorter reach it can be used to attack very quickly.
context: <<POS:06205977>> e.tooltip='The one-handed spear you stole from the hermaphrodite naleen'
